response.justification: Candidate is technically exceptional with current Staff Engineer role, deep TypeScript/React expertise, AWS/Kubernetes background, and active AI/LLM infrastructure work that exceeds all requirements and nice-to-haves. However, significant overqualification creates retention risk and likely salary misalignment for an entry-level position. Not a typical fit despite perfect technical capabilities.
strengths: Currently Staff Engineer at Naver with 14+ years experience and proven expertise across TypeScript, React, Node.js, and full-stack development
Exceeds all nice-to-have qualifications with active AWS/Kubernetes/AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work
Deep software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and clean architecture practiced across multiple senior roles
concerns: Significantly overqualified—candidate recently took Staff position at Naver (April 2025) and unlikely to accept junior/mid-level role long-term
PostgreSQL experience not explicitly mentioned; background emphasizes MongoDB and other databases, though SQL knowledge is present
Retention risk high given career trajectory, current seniority level, and likely salary expectations far exceeding entry-level budget

key_factors.factor: AI/LLM Infrastructure and Modern Platform Alignment
